textPlain: Nice job. Related, I remember seeing an attempt at mapping primes to minor scales a few years back.https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=duVyBVNX3D8
I wonder how it sounds if you map the primes straight onto Hz instead of piano scales.
Very cool.Primes have such an irregular yet structured distribution, and mapping them to pitches is a clever way to make that hidden pattern audible.

It won't be a musical scale if mapped directly to Hz (maybe sine wave mapping?).For example, prime 2 → 2 Hz (inaudible), 101 → 101 Hz (deep bass), 1009 → ~1 kHz (bright tone).Right now the app just maps primes to MIDI notes so they sit nicely on a piano.
